title: ActionSpec
description: A single parameterised action ready for dispatch by motor-output. Represents the M1 population-coded action command. Includes a corollary discharge predicted_outcome for pre-action signal emission.

action_id.description: Unique action identifier (UUID v4). Used to correlate ActionSpec with MotorFeedback.

type.description: Semantic action type. 'dispatch' = effector call; 'query' = read-only; 'notify' = signal; 'write' = filesystem/DB; 'render' = structured output generation.

channel.description: Transport channel. Mapped by channel_selector.py (PMd analogue) from ActionSpec.channel + runtime context.

params.description: Channel-specific dispatch parameters. Schema is channel-dependent.

idempotency_key.description: Optional client-supplied idempotency key. If provided, motor-output skips dispatch and returns cached MotorFeedback if the same key was seen within the deduplication window.

predicted_outcome.description: Corollary discharge payload: expected output before dispatch. Compared against actual_outcome in MotorFeedback to compute deviation_score.

goal_id.description: The ExecutiveGoal this action serves. Required for actor-critic feedback routing.

step_id.description: The SkillStep within the SkillPipeline that generated this ActionSpec.

pipeline_id.description: The SkillPipeline this action belongs to.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum seconds allowed for dispatch before the error policy tier-1 retry triggers.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this ActionSpec was created.
